economic_notes: Nogha Enterprises Ltd., 507409 N.W.T. Ltd., and Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (14.3% ownership) accounted for by modified equity method. Enbridge Community Development Fund deferred contribution of $600,000. Cantung Mines project funded by ISC.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Consolidated statements include Liidlii Kue Society (line-by-line, 100%) and three entities by modified equity method: Nogha Enterprises Ltd. (100%), 507409 N.W.T. Ltd. (100%), and Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (14.3%). Prior year figures restated. Deferred government assistance of $1,202,262 on balance sheet separate from deferred contributions. Enbridge Community Development Fund has $441,288 remaining deferred. ISC COVID-19 UPIP funding of $1,204,081 received. Long-term investments of $3,153,507 classified as non-financial assets. accounts_receivable includes contributions receivable of $541,810 plus net accounts receivable of $171,592. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $1,972,174 + GNWT $1,338,716 + Government of Canada $256,507 + Dehcho First Nations $513,556 = $4,080,953. osr = $5,107,225 - $4,080,953 = $1,026,272 (enterprise income + other revenue net of deferred adjustments).
